industry_trends: Cold brew market projected to grow from $604M (2023) to $3.75B by 2032 — a 6x expansion opportunity
Cold brew has shifted from seasonal summer drink to year-round daily staple; sales remain strong even in cooler months
Flavored cold brew segment growing at 19.07% CAGR through 2030, driven by younger demographics seeking unique profiles
Wellness-infused cold brew (collagen, adaptogens, functional ingredients) is the top product innovation trend in 2025
Easter/spring season drives peak F&B gifting — 69% of consumers celebrate Easter, with food and beverage gifting central
Social media buzz around Easter food & beverage peaks mid-March; limited-edition packaging amplifies influencer reach
70% of global consumers express positive sentiment toward Easter F&B on social media
consumer_motivations: Millennials and Gen Z value craft, origin, and 'new coffee experiences' — they research ingredients and sourcing
Easter shoppers prioritize indulgence + gifting; millennials are the most likely generation to give Easter gifts (26%)
69% of Easter celebrators plan to purchase food for the holiday — coffee aligns naturally as a premium food gift
Smooth taste and low acidity are key purchase drivers; cold brew is positioned as the gentler, premium choice
Convenience matters: busy professionals want grab-and-go quality without sacrificing premium feel
Health consciousness is a major trigger — 62% of consumers consider health an important factor when choosing beverages
FOMO and limited-edition scarcity drive Easter purchase decisions, especially among Gen Z
competitor_messaging: Ryan Reynolds x STōK Cold Brew used humor + celebrity culture to embed cold brew into mainstream culture
Chameleon Cold-Brew's influencer strategy (diverse content creators, 1M followers/month) proves UGC + authentic voice wins
Dunkin and Costa Coffee expanded cold brew menu offerings for spring/summer to capture seasonal demand
Seasonal coffee shops push limited-time Easter bundles: coffee + pastry pairings, gift baskets, branded merchandise
Competitor coffee brands use 'Buy One Get One' holiday promos to accelerate trial and gifting behavior
Pistachio, ginger honey citrus, and other limited-edition flavors are being used as Easter hooks by major chains
content_topics: Easter coffee bar setup and spring morning aesthetic — trending on Instagram and TikTok
Cold brew gift basket unboxing and gifting ideas for coffee-loving family members
'Your Easter ritual, upgraded' — morning routine content tied to the holiday
Cold brew vs. hot coffee — 'choose your Easter energy' format comparisons
Behind-the-scenes limited-edition cold brew can reveal for Easter campaign
Easter egg hunt parody with cold brew cans hidden around the house (comedic UGC angle)
Family gathering + cold brew aesthetic: Easter table setup, brunch vibes

marketing_angles.description: Position cold brew as the premium Easter morning ritual — replaces typical coffee chaos with smooth, effortless energy
marketing_angles.resonance: Connects to consumer desire for a special, indulgent Easter morning experience without the bitterness

marketing_angles.description: Cold brew as the perfect gifting item — premium, practical, universally loved, zero risk of being the wrong size
marketing_angles.resonance: Taps into millennials' Easter gifting behavior and the 'safe premium gift' desire

marketing_angles.description: Use Easter's cultural association with calm, renewal, and lightness to mirror cold brew's smooth, low-acid profile
marketing_angles.resonance: Ties product truth (smooth, low acidity) to an emotional Easter narrative of peace and fresh starts

marketing_angles.description: Create urgency and FOMO with a seasonal limited-edition framing — even without an actual product variant, the campaign can feel exclusive
marketing_angles.resonance: Scarcity + seasonal packaging drives purchase intent, especially among Gen Z and millennial food enthusiasts

video_concepts.title: Easter Morning Upgrade
video_concepts.hook: Most people wake up to chaos on Easter. You wake up to cold brew.
scene_breakdown: Scene 1 (0–5s): Easter morning chaos — animated alarm, colorful Easter eggs flying, hot coffee spilling
Scene 2 (5–10s): Hand reaches for Cold Brew can in slow motion; scene calms, color shifts to amber + cold blue
Scene 3 (10–15s): Character sips cold brew; sparkles burst, Easter egg motifs transform into energy icons
Scene 4 (15–20s): CTA text animates in: 'Upgrade Your Easter Morning' with coffee can and egg silhouette

video_concepts.title: The Easter Gift Nobody Returns
video_concepts.hook: Chocolate? Flowers? Try again. Cold brew is the Easter gift that actually wins.
scene_breakdown: Scene 1 (0–4s): Strike-through animations on typical Easter gifts (chocolate egg, flowers, socks)
Scene 2 (4–9s): Cold brew can slides in with a spring 'pop'; Easter ribbon SVG wraps around it
Scene 3 (9–13s): Social proof text fades in: 'Zero returns since forever.'
Scene 4 (13–15s): CTA: 'Grab Yours' with arrow pointing down

ad_hooks: Your Easter morning just got a serious upgrade. ☕
Skip the hot mess. Cold brew your Easter.
This Easter, serve the good stuff.
Smooth as Easter Sunday. No bitterness allowed.
Hot coffee on Easter? Life's too short for that.
